description: In 1931 New York City, a group of Chronicom hunters ambushes police officers in a shadowy alley. They brutally take their faces to impersonate them for their mission. This ominous act sets up the supernatural threat for the episode and establishes the Chronicoms' willingness to alter history by any means.

transcript.line: Could be any time. When he gets here, just count the dough and let me do the talking.
Who the hell are these guys?
You boys lost? Gotta be off your nut, walking around like that.
Captain William Dole. New York Police Department, Fourth Precinct. I'm a sentient Chronicom from the planet Chronyca-2.
Good for you. Now beat it... before we make you freaks regret being born.
I'm warning you. Last chance, pal.
